overall.description: Third-person exploration gameplay inside the Temple of Hades from Assassin's Creed Odyssey. The player slowly examines the temple interior featuring a large statue of Hades, Spartan tapestries, scattered pottery, and grand ionic columns before approaching a ceremonial staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple sanctuary floor with statue base

events.description: camera lowers to inspect scattered pottery on the mosaic floor

agents.ego_description: slowly walking around the base of the statue examining the tapestries and scattered ceremonial pottery

entered.detail: stone platform supporting the large statue with decorative chains and hanging bells
red banner with gold lambda symbol suspended by chains against the pedestal
broken pottery and ceremonial vessels scattered across the mosaic floor
intricate tiled floor with geometric patterns in gold and red tones

segments.scene_description: The segment shows close exploration of the temple floor around the statue base. The camera moves slowly over the mosaic tiles, revealing scattered broken pottery and a prominent red Spartan tapestry with the lambda symbol hanging from the stone platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple main hall with columns and murals

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing the full statue illuminated from above by high windows
panning left from the statue to reveal the columned hall and wall murals

agents.ego_description: tilting the view upward to admire the full statue then panning across the temple architecture to examine the columns

entered.detail: large robed statue of Hades with crown holding a staff, illuminated from above
tall fluted stone columns with ornate capitals supporting the temple ceiling
painted frescoes on the walls depicting figures in classical Greek style

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal the imposing statue of Hades atop its pedestal, then pans left across the temple interior showcasing tall ionic columns and detailed wall murals depicting classical Greek scenes.

events.description: moving from the main hall into the staircase chamber
camera begins ascending the grand staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand staircase and beginning to climb toward the upper temple level

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with many steps leading upward to an upper temple level
red decorative cushion placed at the base of the stairs
sword standing point-down embedded in the ceremonial cushion
vertical purple light beam indicating a target location at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward a grand stone staircase flanked by walls, passing a ceremonial sword embedded in a cushion at the base. A purple objective beam marks the destination at the top of the stairs as the camera begins to ascend the steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate look at the temple floor before expanding to reveal the grand scale of the interior and ascending toward a distant objective. It begins by gliding over mosaic tiles and scattered broken pottery, lingering on a red Spartan tapestry with a lambda symbol draped over a stone platform. As the camera tilts upward, the view shifts from the ground to the imposing statue of Hades atop its pedestal, then pans left to showcase towering ionic columns and detailed classical murals. The scene then moves forward toward a grand stone staircase, passing a ceremonial sword embedded in a cushion at the base. Finally, the camera begins to ascend the steps, guided by a purple objective beam marking the destination at the top.
